features: 🛡️ Lead Duplication Prevention - Prevents duplicate Customer and Job records in LEAP
🔄 Enhanced Data Preservation - Maintains referral info and rep assignments during updates
🏢 Job Division Field Fix - Properly sets division (e.g., Supplier, Renovation) for all job operations
⚙️ Feature Flag Support - LEAP_STRICT_UPDATE_MODE for safe rollbacks
📝 Enhanced Logging - Better visibility into preserved fields and operations
🚀 Improved LEAP CRM Integration - Comprehensive safe update logic
